description: This watch from puma comes in a heavy duty design. The assymentric dial and chunky casing gives this watch a tough appearance perfect for navigating the urban jungle.Dial shape: RoundCase diameter: 32 cmWarranty: 2 YearsStainless steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortLeather straps with a tang clasp for comfort and styleBlack dial with cat logo on the 12 hour markDate aperture at the 3 hour markAnalog time displaySolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant upto 100 metres
